name: Single-Prospect Deep Dive
description: Researches one prospect in depth before you reach out or get on a call. Walks you in knowing who they are, what they care about, and the angle most likely to land.
prompt_template: Research the one prospect I name below in depth. Pull together who they are, what their business does, recent news or signals, likely pain points, and how what I offer connects. End with two or three angles I could open with and one specific thing to mention that shows I did my homework. Give it to me as a short brief I can read before reaching out.
